glosses.vi: cuộc đi dạo; buổi đi dạo
glosses.ja: 散歩; ぶらぶら歩き

sentences.target: Ich mache jeden Abend einen Spaziergang.

translations.de: Ich mache jeden Abend einen Spaziergang.
translations.en: I take a walk every evening.
translations.es: Salgo a caminar todas las tardes.
translations.fr: Je vais me promener tous les soirs.
translations.pt: Eu dou uma caminhada todas as noites.
translations.nl: Ik maak elke avond een wandeling.
translations.hi: मैं हर शाम टहलने जाता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg går en tur hver kveld.
translations.sv: Jag tar en promenad varje kväll.
translations.ro: Ies la plimbare în fiecare seară.
translations.da: Jeg går en tur hver aften.

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (1st sg, present indicative); predicates the action.
Quantifying determiner modifying 'Abend' (accusative); part of a temporal NP.
Noun used as an accusative time expression ('jeden Abend').
Indefinite article (accusative singular) marking the direct object.
Concrete noun; direct object (accusative) of 'mache'.

sentences.target: Nach dem Essen tut ein Spaziergang gut.
sentences.reading: /naːx deːm ˈʔɛsən tuːt aɪ̯n ʃpaˈtsiːɐ̯ɡaŋ ɡuːt/

translations.de: Nach dem Essen tut ein Spaziergang gut.
translations.ipa: /naːx deːm ˈʔɛsən tuːt aɪ̯n ʃpaˈtsiːɐ̯ɡaŋ ɡuːt/
translations.en: A walk feels good after eating.
translations.es: Un paseo sienta bien después de comer.
translations.fr: Une promenade fait du bien après le repas.
translations.it: Una passeggiata fa bene dopo aver mangiato.
translations.yue: 食完飯行下覺得好舒服。
translations.pt: Uma caminhada faz bem depois de comer.
translations.vi: Đi dạo sau khi ăn thấy rất dễ chịu.
translations.nl: Een wandeling is fijn na het eten.
translations.hi: खाना खाने के बाद टहलना अच्छा लगता है.
translations.el: Μετά το φαγητό η βόλτα κάνει καλό.
translations.nb: En tur etter maten gjør godt.
translations.sv: En promenad känns skönt efter maten.
translations.ro: O plimbare prinde bine după masă.
translations.da: En gåtur efter maden føles godt.
translations.ja: 食後に歩くと気持ちいいです。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing dative; introduces a temporal PP.
Definite article (dative singular) modifying 'Essen' under 'Nach'.
Noun; object of the preposition 'Nach' (dative).
Finite lexical verb (3rd sg, present); support verb in the expression 'tut gut'.
Indefinite article (nominative singular) marking the subject.
Noun; grammatical subject (nominative) of 'tut'.
Predicative adjective complement to 'tut'; expresses benefit.

sentences.target: Wir haben heute einen Spaziergang vor.

translations.de: Wir haben heute einen Spaziergang vor.
translations.en: We have a walk planned today.
translations.fr: Nous avons prévu une promenade aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Abbiamo in programma una passeggiata oggi.
translations.ru: У нас на сегодня запланирована прогулка.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng tôi dự định đi dạo.
translations.nl: We hebben vandaag een wandeling gepland.
translations.uk: На сьогодні у нас запланована прогулянка.
translations.hi: हमने आज टहलने की योजना बनाई है.
translations.nb: Vi har planlagt en tur i dag.
translations.sv: Vi har planerat en promenad i dag.
translations.da: Vi har planlagt en gåtur i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は散歩する予定です。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (1st pl, present) as part of the separable verb 'vorhaben' ('to plan').
Temporal adverb; sets the time frame.
Indefinite article (accusative singular) marking the object.
Noun; accusative direct object of the separable verb 'vorhaben'.
Separable verbal particle of 'vorhaben' placed clause-final.

sentences.target: Oma liebt den kurzen Spaziergang im Park.
sentences.reading: /ˈoːma liːpt deːn ˈkʊʁt͡sən ʃpaˈtsiːɐ̯ɡaŋ ɪm paʁk/

translations.de: Oma liebt den kurzen Spaziergang im Park.
translations.ipa: /ˈoːma liːpt deːn ˈkʊʁt͡sən ʃpaˈtsiːɐ̯ɡaŋ ɪm paʁk/
translations.en: Grandma loves the short walk in the park.
translations.es: A la abuela le encanta dar un paseo corto por el parque.
translations.fr: Mamie adore faire une petite promenade au parc.
translations.it: La nonna ama fare una passeggiata breve al parco.
translations.ko: 할머니는 공원에서 짧게 산책하는 걸 좋아해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 奶奶喜欢在公园里走一小会儿。
translations.yue: 阿嫲鍾意喺公園行一陣。
translations.ru: Бабушка любит короткую прогулку в парке.
translations.pt: A vovó adora dar uma caminhada curta no parque.
translations.tr: Büyükanne parkta kısa bir yürüyüş yapmayı sever.
translations.vi: Bà thích đi dạo ngắn trong công viên.
translations.ar: الجدة تحب المشي القصير في الحديقة.
translations.nl: Oma houdt van een korte wandeling in het park.
translations.uk: Бабуся любить коротку прогулянку в парку.
translations.hu: Nagymama szereti a rövid sétát a parkban.
translations.hi: दादी को पार्क में छोटी सैर पसंद है.
translations.pl: Babcia uwielbia krótki spacer v пapky.
translations.el: Η γιαγιά αγαπά τη σύντομη βόλτα στο πάρκο.
translations.nb: Bestemor elsker den korte turen i parken.
translations.id: Nenek suka jalan-jalan singkat di taman.
translations.sv: Mormor älskar en kort promenad i parken.
translations.ro: Bunica iubește o plimbare scurtă în parc.
translations.cs: Babička miluje krátkou procházku v parku.
translations.da: Bedstemor elsker den korte gåtur i parken.
translations.ja: おばあちゃんは公園で短い散歩が好きです。

tokens.explanation: Common noun; nominative subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb (3rd sg, present); expresses emotion toward the object.
Definite article (accusative singular) marking the direct object NP.
Attributive adjective (inflected), modifying 'Spaziergang' in the object NP.
Concrete noun; accusative direct object of 'liebt'.
Contracted preposition ('in' + 'dem'); introduces a dative PP indicating location.
Noun; object of the preposition 'im' (dative), specifying place.
